data.title: TransUnion to release Q4 2025 results on Feb 12, 2026; conference call at 8:30am CT. Website for updates: http://www.transunion.com/tru.
data.description: TransUnion (NYSE: TRU) is set to release its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. This data will be disclosed through a press release around 6:00 a.m. Central Time (CT) on Thursday, February 12, 2026. A conference call is scheduled for the same day at 8:30 a.m. (CT) to delve into these financial results. Interested individuals can access the press release and a real-time webcast of the earnings conference call on the TransUnion Investor Relations page at http://www.transunion.com/tru.
JPMORGAN - EXTENDS GAINS TO 2% IN PREMARKET TRADING AFTER RESULTS

data.title: BD invests $110M to support US pharmaceutical supply chain, introduces BD Neopak™ Glass Prefillable Syringe in Nebraska.
data.description: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) has recently announced a significant investment of $110 million to enhance its production capabilities in Columbus, Nebraska. The company is introducing the BD Neopak™ Glass Prefillable Syringe production at this location. This expansion is part of BD's commitment to advancing medical technology globally.

data.title: Cardinal Health expects EPS of $10.00 for fiscal year 2026, raised from $9.65-$9.85. Specialty revenue growth is accelerating.
data.description: Cardinal Health has revised its fiscal year 2026 non-GAAP diluted earnings per share (EPS) forecast, raising it to a minimum of $10.00, up from the previous range of $9.65 to $9.85. Additionally, the company anticipates accelerated growth in its Specialty revenues.

data.title: Truecaller AB repurchased 150,000 shares on Jan 12, 2026, following legal guidelines in Sweden.
data.description: Today, Truecaller AB (publ) disclosed that on January 12, 2026, it repurchased 150,000 shares in line with the Swedish Financial Instruments Trading Act (1991:980). This transaction increased the company's holding of its own shares.

data.title: UK introduces 21Shares BOLD fund, investing two-thirds in gold and one-third in Bitcoin. Available on London Stock Exchange.
data.description: The 21Shares Bitcoin Gold ETP has a distribution of approximately 66% to gold and 33% to Bitcoin. It is currently available for trading in both pounds sterling and dollars on the London Stock Exchange.
JPM CEO: EACH LINE OF BUSINESS PERFORMED WELL

data.title: BJ’s Wholesale Club opening in Selma, NC on January 23, the 11th location in NC, with a gas station opened on January 7.
data.description: BJ’s Wholesale Club, with the stock symbol BJ, disclosed today that its new store in Selma, North Carolina, will debut on January 23. Situated at 370 Trinity Springs Lane, this location marks the company's 11th establishment in North Carolina. The store features a BJ’s Gas station that commenced operations on January 7, providing competitive fuel prices and possible additional discounts through BJ’s Fuel Savers Program. BJ’s is renowned for offering unparalleled deals on daily necessities in a hassle-free shopping experience for members.

data.title: Hallmark is offering a Semi-Annual Sale from Jan. 15-31 with Buy One, Get One 50% Off on greeting cards $2.99 and up.
data.description: Hallmark is launching a new Semi-Annual Sale where customers can avail of a Buy One, Get One 50% Off deal on individual greeting cards priced at $2.99 and up. This offer is applicable on purchases made on Hallmark.com and at Hallmark Gold Crown Stores. The sale aims to encourage increased moments of connection, starting from Jan. 13, 2026.

data.title: Tradr launches 4 new leveraged ETFs, including CRMX and PATX offering 200% long exposure. Sophisticated investors targeted.
data.description: Tradr ETFs, a company specializing in ETFs for experienced investors and traders, has introduced four new single stock leveraged ETFs. Among the suite is CRMX and PATX, which are the first of their kind and aim to offer 200% long exposure. The launch took place on January 13, 2026 in New York.

data.title: ITAÚ UNIBANCO to present 4Q25 results on Feb 5, 2026, at 8am (EST) and 10am (Brasília time) in an interactive meeting. Register to participate.
data.description: In Sao Paulo, an announcement has been made regarding the presentation of 4Q25 results on February 5, 2026, at 8 a.m. (EST) and 10 a.m. (Brasília time). The presentation will be conducted in both Portuguese and English, featuring an interactive session with a Q&A segment. Those interested in participating can register for the event.

data.title: Vista Gold aims to start detailed engineering & design by early 2027 for Mt Todd project, with a 27-month process ahead.
data.description: In Denver, Vista Gold Corp. (NYSE American and TSX: VGZ) shared updates on the Mt Todd gold project, confirming plans to kickstart detailed engineering and design work by early 2027. This pivotal stage is projected to launch a 27-month cycle encompassing design, construction, and commissioning activities. The Mt Todd Feasibility Study from July 2025 ("2025 FS") highlighted the possibility of expediting the development of a smaller initial project by focusing on higher priorities.
